nasb.text: Therefore you and all your company are gathered together against the Lord; but as for Aaron, who is he that you grumble against him?”

esv.text: Therefore it is against the Lord that you and all your company have gathered together. What is Aaron that you grumble against him?”

cnv.text: 所以你和你的同黨聚集起來反抗耶和華；亞倫算甚麼呢？你們竟向他發怨言。”

ccb.text: 其实你和你的同伙合谋反叛的是耶和华，而不是亚伦。”
